selectedWork.imageAlt: Rabbit-duck illusion diagram on a black background
selectedWork.title: Why AI Models Are Bad at Verifying Photos
selectedWork.description: We tested how leading AI image models perform when asked to verify the authenticity of photos.

selectedWork.imageAlt: Comparison charts of eight AI search engines' citation performance
selectedWork.title: AI Search Has a Citation Problem
selectedWork.descriptionHtml: We tested eight AI search tools on their ability to cite news sources accurately. This builds on our previous study, which examined how ChatGPT cites news sources.
selectedWork.moreHtml: This report has been covered by Nieman Lab, Ars Technica, Axios, El País, Yale Insights, and others.

selectedWork.imageAlt: ChatGPT Atlas logo on a phone screen
selectedWork.title: How AI Browsers Sneak Past Blockers and Paywalls
selectedWork.descriptionHtml: Agents mimic standard Chrome sessions, making them indistinguishable from regular human traffic and invisible to crawler-blocking tools. This report was covered by Gizmodo and others.

selectedWork.imageAlt: Chatbot correcting a false premise in a user query
selectedWork.title: AI Chatbots Can Search the Web—So Why Don’t They?
selectedWork.description: Live search is resource-intensive and adds latency, so platforms rely on automated routing systems to decide when to deploy these tools. This routing can misfire.

selectedWork.title: ‘Automating the Boring Stuff’ with Pollfinder.ai
selectedWork.description: Pollfinder.ai is a tool we are building that uses large language models (LLMs) to help polling aggregators discover, extract, and organize polling data more efficiently.

interactives.title: AI Deals and Disputes Tracker
interactives.description: This tracker monitors developments between news publishers and AI companies—including Lawsuits, Deals, and Grants—based on publicly available information.

interactives.title: Platforms and Publishers Timeline
interactives.description: A timeline of key developments in the relationship between technology platforms and news publishers
